videoSnippet.title: "literally a perfect game" || Nodirbek Yakubboev vs Jorden van Foreest || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:

VYakubboev, Nodirbek (2691) - Van Foreest, Jorden (2705)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.02.28
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, classical variation (5.Bf4)

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 Be7 5.Bf4 O-O 6.e3 Nbd7 7.c5 Nh5 8.Bd3 b6 9.b4 a5 10.a3 Nxf4 11.exf4 c6 12.O-O Ba6 13.Bxa6 Rxa6 14.b5 cxb5 15.c6 Nb8 16.Nxb5 Nxc6 17.Qc2 Qd7 18.Rfc1 Nb4 19.Qe2 Nc6 20.Qc2 Nb4 21.Qe2 Nc6 22.a4 Raa8 23.Ne5 Nxe5 24.Rc7 Nf3+ 25.Qxf3 Qd8 26.Rac1 Bb4 27.R1c6 Qf6 28.g4 Bd2 29.f5 Qg5 30.fxe6 fxe6 31.Qe2 Bf4 32.Qxe6+ Kh8 33.Rc8 Qh4 34.Kf1 Bc7 35.Rxf8+ Rxf8 36.Rc2 Qh3+ 37.Ke1 Qxh2 38.Qxd5 Qg1+ 39.Kd2 Rxf2+ 40.Kc3 Qa1+ 41.Kd3 Qd1+ 42.Ke3 Rf8 43.Rxc7 Re8+ 44.Qe5 Rxe5+ 45.dxe5 Qxg4 46.Nd6 h5 47.Rc4 Qe6 48.Re4 Kg8 49.Nb5 g5 50.Nd4 Qh3+ 51.Ke2 Kf7 52.e6+ Ke7 53.Nc6+ Ke8 54.e7 Qg2+ 55.Kd3 h4 56.Nd4 h3 57.Nb5 Qg3+ 58.Re3 Qf4 59.Re4 h2
